prompt: A cup of coffee starts at 90 C in a room held at 20 C. It cools according to Newton's law of cooling with rate constant k = 0.05 per minute. What is its temperature (in C) after 30 minutes?
rationale: Newton cooling has a closed form, so both numerical simulation and exact_computation are acceptable strategies (both realised in code); pure text continuation still mis-estimates the exponential decay.
